summary: LUCCCA Enterprise Framework Phase 1-5 testing complete. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Enterprise Command Center with 6 KPIs, Classic Widgets toggle (19 widgets), all 6 sidebar sections, 10 professional themes in Settings > Appearance, theme switching functional, Share Panel Layout button in toolbar, System Health showing all 10 engines with green status.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns across 10 engine modules
All API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Enterprise Command Center endpoint aggregates data from all 10 engines correctly
Theme manager supports 10 professional themes with light/dark variants
Sidebar properly organized into 6 sections with all modules accessible
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 11 ingredients, 5 recipes, 5 menu items, 8 events, 8 labor positions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1-5 fully tested. Backend: All 10 engines active (operations_core, ai_forecasting, pos_integration, event_lifecycle, labor_cost, event_bus, payroll, workflow, notifications, tamper_audit). Enterprise Command Center API returns comprehensive data from all engines. Dashboard widget endpoints all return 200. Frontend: Enterprise Command Center shows 6 KPIs (Revenue, Labor Cost, Inventory, Events, Workflows, Forecast), Hourly Revenue chart, System Health with 10 green engines, Event Pipeline, Operations, Labor & Payroll sections. Classic Widgets view shows 19 widgets. Sidebar has 6 sections (Core Operations, Financial & Supply, Events & Catering, Enterprise & Compliance, Analytics & AI, Community & Support). Settings > Appearance has 10 themes (LUCCCA Signature, Midnight Luxe, Obsidian Pro, Emerald Executive, Rose Gold, Arctic Frost, Corporate Professional, Vibrant Energy, Minimal Clean, Warm Hospitality). Share Panel Layout button in toolbar with Copy/Share/Invite options.

enterprise_command_center.loads_with_6_kpis: PASS - Revenue, Labor Cost, Inventory, Events, Workflows, Forecast
enterprise_command_center.system_health_10_engines: PASS - All 10 engines show green status
